parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ vector: $json.query_embedding, limit: $json.top_k, with_payload: true, filter: { must: $json.process_line ? [{ key: 'process_line', match: { value: $json.process_line } }] : [] } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ query: $json.query, passages: $json.search_results.map(r => r.payload.chunk_text || ''), top_k: Math.min($json.top_k, 5) }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: $json.system_prompt }, { role: 'user', content: $json.user_prompt } ], temperature: 0.1, max_tokens: 1500, top_p: 0.95 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ command: 'SETEX', args: [ 'ai_cache:' + Buffer.from($json.query).toString('base64').substring(0, 64), 3600, JSON.stringify({ answer: $json.answer, confidence_score: $json.confidence_score, sources: $json.final_results.map(r => ({ index: r.index, doc: r.payload?.file_name })) }) ] }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO retrieval_logs (query_text, user_id, user_role, process_line, shift, matched_doc_ids, matched_indexes, top_k_scores, rerank_scores, answer_text, confidence_score, hallucination_flag, cache_hit, total_latency_ms, embedding_latency_ms, vector_query_latency_ms, rerank_latency_ms, llm_latency_ms, tokens_used, cost_estimate) VALUES ($1, '{{ $('Hallucination_Check_And_Score').item.json.user_id }}', '{{ $('Hallucination_Check_And_Score').item.json.user_role }}', '{{ $('Hallucination_Check_And_Score').item.json.process_line }}', '{{ $('Hallucination_Check_And_Score').item.json.shift }}', ARRAY[{{ $('Hallucination_Check_And_Score').item.json.matched_doc_ids.map(d => "'" + d + "'").join(',') }}]::uuid[], ARRAY[{{ $('Hallucination_Check_And_Score').item.json.matched_indexes.map(i => "'" + i + "'").join(',') }}], ARRAY[{{ $('Hallucination_Check_And_Score').item.json.top_k_scores.join(',') }}], ARRAY[{{ $('Hallucination_Check_And_Score').item.json.rerank_scores.join(',') }}], $2, {{ $('Hallucination_Check_And_Score').item.json.confidence_score }}, {{ $('Hallucination_Check_And_Score').item.json.hallucination_flag }}, false, {{ Date.now() - $('Hallucination_Check_And_Score').item.json._metrics.start_time }}, {{ $('Hallucination_Check_And_Score').item.json._metrics.embedding_latency_ms || 0 }}, {{ $('Hallucination_Check_And_Score').item.json._metrics.vector_query_latency_ms || 0 }}, {{ $('Hallucination_Check_And_Score').item.json._metrics.rerank_latency_ms || 0 }}, {{ $('Hallucination_Check_And_Score').item.json._metrics.answer_generation_latency_ms || 0 }}, {{ $('Hallucination_Check_And_Score').item.json.tokens_used }}, {{ $('Hallucination_Check_And_Score').item.json.cost_estimate }});

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, query_id: $json._metrics.query_id, answer: $json.answer, confidence_score: $json.confidence_score, hallucination_flag: $json.hallucination_flag, sources: ($json.final_results || []).map(r => ({ index: r.index, document: r.payload?.file_name, process_line: r.payload?.process_line, score: r.score })), latency_seconds: $json._total_latency_seconds, cache_hit: false }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, answer: $json.answer, confidence_score: $json.confidence_score, sources: $json.sources || [], latency_seconds: $json.latency_seconds, cache_hit: true }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO security_audit_log (event_type, user_id, user_role, details) VALUES ('{{ $json.event_type }}', 'unknown', 'unknown', '{{ JSON.stringify({ error: $json.error_message, node: $json.error_node, timestamp: $json.timestamp }) }}'::jsonb);
